## Checklist

- [ ] S11 Language Standard — no forbidden terms in any changed file
- [ ] All new documents follow the established format for their document type
- [ ] Links and cross-references verified
- [ ] Markdown linting passes locally (or CI confirms)
- [ ] For compliance documents — Legal basis is cited with article reference
- [ ] For ADRs — Status, Date, Deciders, and Consequences sections are complete
- [ ] For governance motions — Status is DRAFT until approved by Pattern
